ops.body: Pre-T3/pre-release fix queue (from sol finder/refuter reviews of the unpushed stack c3e8035a → 81b63b39 → e246a077; fable-triaged 2026-07-16): on c3e8035a — (1) unify the gate emptiness predicate to the text-level GATE_ROLE_BLOCK-strip at every seam (role-marker-shaped payload can currently pass insert/export yet fail freeze), (2) completion bookkeeping for sessions whose random-negative anchors were all dropped (currently re-parsed every pass forever), (3) GatePruneReport counts derived inside the delete transaction. On e246a077/81b63b39 — (M1) normal watcher lane must validate incumbent probs/threshold BEFORE paid Tinker training (regression: used to be free-fail-first), (M2) fresh-epoch AUC floor must reject NaN (single-class frame → sklearn NaN AUC currently passes `<= 0.5`), (M3) journal cc-notes mirror helper must swallow malformed-output TypeError/KeyError/AttributeError (can currently raise after promotion side effects), (M4) weekly retrain launchd agent lacks a journal repo/cwd so the unattended mirror silently never fires — fix + REINSTALL PLIST after the release, (L1) fresh-epoch crash-guard scans probs/*.json digests directly (pruned-orphan gap). Rejected: fresh-epoch concurrency mutex (temporal one-shot guard, not a lock), zip-safe asset lookup (matches existing repo pattern). T3 runs only after these land + release ships + idempotent prune & local re-export (the ~10:03Z nightly still runs the old wheel until then).
